main.description: Record declaring that a feed post is pinned to the top of the GainForest activity feed. Written into the GainForest moderation group repo by a steward (via the group service), and read back by the appview when assembling the feed's first page. `subject` is a com.atproto.repo.strongRef to the pinned app.gainforest.feed.post. Unpin = delete this record. The appview treats the newest pin record as authoritative when several exist.
